scripts.test:visual: docker run --rm -v .:/work -w /work -e TEST_ENV=${TEST_ENV:-dev} mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.59.1-noble npx playwright test tests/e2e/chapter0-visual-regression-tests.spec.ts
scripts.test:visual:update: docker run --rm -v .:/work -w /work -e TEST_ENV=${TEST_ENV:-dev} mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.59.1-noble npx playwright test tests/e2e/chapter0-visual-regression-tests.spec.ts --update-snapshots
